category_sources: Official GitHub README describes wush as a command line tool for peer-to-peer WireGuard file transfer and shells.
source_facts.description says it transfers files between computers via WireGuard.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is wush.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides install, basic usage, and technical details and is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/coder/wush, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says wush transfers files and opens shells over peer-to-peer WireGuard.
Official GitHub repository topics include go, peer-to-peer, file-transfer, and wireguard.
